//: Files under `src/archivist/**` may import `./substrate-internal`. Imports from
any other path fail at type-check via the `paths` rule below combined with the
main tsconfig's exclusion of this module from its `paths`.
This is a standalone type-check config — `npx tsc -p src/archivist/tsconfig.archivist.json
--noEmit` runs the path-restriction gate in isolation. It is intentionally NOT wired
`tsc`) already type-checks `src/archivist/**` cleanly, and the repo has no `tsc --build`
convention. Because it is `--noEmit`-only and never `tsc --build`'d, it is NOT a
`composite` project — `composite` would require every transitively-pulled file to be
in `include`, re-raising TS6307 for the `src/backends/**` files the substrate factories
depend on. `rootDir` is `..` (= `src/`) because the substrate factories `import type`
the real `RvfBackend` from `src/backends/**` (ADR-0180 OF#10 — thin pass-throughs to
the layer that owns durability); a `rootDir` scoped to `src/archivist` would reject
those cross-tree type imports with TS6059. `include` stays scoped to the archivist
tree so only this module is gated.
Follow-up still owed to the package's `exports` field in package.json: keep
`substrate-internal.ts` out of the published surface so external consumers cannot
